reason: 'permanent' and 'prevailing' are not synonyms — they are distinct senses. Fix list to reflect this clearly.

'grant' is the more precise and common translation of bevilja (grant a loan, grant permission); 'allow' is secondary.
Secondary sense 'of or pertaining to conservatives/liberals in European politics' is marginal and political-jargon. Drop it — single everyday meaning.
Missing common sense 'cheat, swindle' (bli blåst = get duped), which appears in the examples. Also clean up the list.

'home, residence, dwelling' is three near-synonyms for one concept. Trim to two clear options.

'something very bad' is a very marginal slang sense. Drop it — single everyday meaning.
